team_name: TenderLens AI — Explainable AI Tender Evaluation & Eligibility Analysis Platform for CRPF
summary: Design a technical platform that automates tender evaluation, bidder eligibility analysis, and produces explainable evaluation reports for government procurement by CRPF.
optimization_claims: creates defensible audit trails for every tender
constraints_addressed: real constraints procurement officers need to SIGN decisions, not rubber-stamp them
handles scanned documents and photographs, not just digital text
end-to-end auditable, suitable for formal government procurement
